wafregional.bytematchset.ByteMatchTuples.Description: Specifies the bytes (typically a string that corresponds with ASCII characters) that you want AWS WAF to search for in web requests, the location in requests that you want AWS WAF to search, and other settings.

wafregional.bytematchset.Name.Description: A friendly name or description of the `ByteMatchSet`. You can't change `Name` after you create a `ByteMatchSet`.
